project_type: Next.js 16 full-stack app with Supabase backend
test_framework: No test framework configured (no test files exist)
verification_instructions: 1. Run pnpm build to verify TypeScript compiles. 2. Run pnpm lint to verify no linting errors.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Node 22 available via nvm. pnpm available. No Supabase instance running locally, so validation is limited to TypeScript compilation and linting.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md. Follow existing code patterns: use 'use client' directive for client components, Tailwind CSS 4 for styling, Supabase for data layer with hardcoded fallbacks when not configured.
key_patterns: 1. School context stored in localStorage via useSyncExternalStore pattern (src/lib/school-context.tsx). 2. API routes use Next.js route handlers with SupabaseConfigurationError fallback to hardcoded data. 3. Netflix-style card UI on select-school page. 4. SchoolGuard component redirects to /select-school if no school selected. 5. Zones loaded from Supabase 'zones' table without school_id filtering (the bug). 6. Report HTML generated by createInventoryReportHtml() in src/lib/reporting.ts with hardcoded breakdown sections.
directory_structure: src/app/ - Next.js app router pages and API routes. src/lib/ - shared utilities (inventory-store.ts for Supabase CRUD, api-client.ts for client-side fetch, reporting.ts for HTML report generation, school-context.tsx for React context). src/components/ - reusable components (SchoolGuard.tsx). supabase/ - schema.sql and migrations/. public/ - static assets.
